values.value: ItemDesignation__c:productName; Stock__c:stockQuantity; Quantity:pdo; StatePyxis__c:itemStatus; Discount:discountPercent; UnitPrice:unitPrice; Nomenclature__c:nomenclature; Supplier__c:supplier; TransformChannel__c:transformChannel; TransformTransaction__c:transformTransaction; TransformStore__c:transformStore; ProductSection__c:section; ProductSubsection__c:subsection; ProductType__c:type; ProductSubtype__c:subtype; ProductCode__c:productReferenceEan; Line_Number__c:lineNumber; TotalWithVat__c:totalAmount
